# Rewardful vs Tolt vs FirstPromoter: SaaS Affiliate Software Compared (Refgrow)

**URL:** https://refgrow.com/compare-competitors/rewardful-vs-tolt-vs-firstpromoter
**Retrieved:** 2026-05-20
**Source type:** comparison
**Authority:** high
**Relevance:** high
**Topic:** platform-selection

## Summary

Head-to-head three-way comparison of the three dominant SMB-tier SaaS affiliate platforms, with a focus on cost-at-scale math. The article reveals a non-obvious pricing insight: Rewardful charges up to 9% transaction fees on lower plans, Tolt charges 2.9% + $0.30 per conversion (making them expensive at volume), and FirstPromoter charges no transaction fees but starts at $99/mo. At ~$5K/month in affiliate revenue, FirstPromoter (0% fees) becomes cheaper than Rewardful (9% fees) despite the higher base price. Fraud detection: FirstPromoter strongest, Rewardful mid-tier, Tolt the simplest. Tolt is the only platform offering an embeddable widget with custom domain support.

## Key facts for stinger-forge

- **Pricing comparison at scale (important for the decision matrix):**
  - Rewardful: from $49/mo + up to 9% transaction fees (revenue-cap based)
  - Tolt: from $47/mo + 2.9% transaction fees per conversion (this is the CURRENT 2026 pricing - has changed repeatedly)
  - FirstPromoter: from $99/mo, NO transaction fees
  - Break-even point: FirstPromoter becomes cheaper than Rewardful above ~$5K/month in affiliate-tracked revenue
- **Fraud detection ranking:** FirstPromoter > Rewardful > Tolt
- **Embeddable widget:** Tolt only (custom domain). Rewardful and FirstPromoter use external portals only.
- **Billing provider support:**
  - FirstPromoter: Stripe, Paddle, Recurly, Braintree, Chargebee
  - Tolt: Stripe + Paddle
  - Rewardful: Stripe only (note: other sources say Rewardful added Paddle - verify on current docs)
- **Key caveat for stinger-forge:** Tolt pricing has "changed multiple times" per multiple sources - always recommend verifying Tolt's current pricing page before including in client recommendations. The $29/mo figure appears in some sources, $47/mo + fees in others - pricing tiers vary.
- **Revenue caps per plan (starter plans):**
  - Rewardful: $7.5k/mo affiliate revenue cap on starter
  - Tolt: $10k/mo affiliate revenue cap on starter
  - FirstPromoter: $5k/mo affiliate revenue cap on starter
